programme.title: Southern Law
programme.desc: Louisiana police chase down a vehicle after they nearly get struck in a collision; K9 patrol in Marion County Florida enlists an air unit to help them and their dogs track down suspected burglars on the run.

programme.title: Southern Law
programme.desc: Richland County South Carolina officers smell marijuana coming from a car, which leads to a car and foot chase. An officer in Wilmington North Carolina responds to a disturbance call by showing off her football throwing skills.

programme.title: Southern Law
programme.desc: Berkeley County South Carolina officers go the extra mile in a high-speed chase. K9 patrol in Wilmington, North Carolina, use their dogs to sniff out a carload of potential contraband. Officers in Citrus County, Florida, track down a stolen vehicle used for suspicious activity.

programme.title: Southern Law
programme.desc: A man in Richland County, SC leads police on a vehicle pursuit that ends when he crashes into a highway exit sign; a female employee at a local restaurant in Tallahassee, FL allegedly stabs a customer in the back four times before being apprehended by police; neighbors in Citrus County, FL get into an argument about their dogs that ends with a chihuahua being cut with a knife.

programme.title: Southern Law
programme.desc: A highly irate man at a burger joint in El Paso is tased by police. Richland County police find a bag full of possible drugs in a suspicious car. Pasco County police respond to a landlord-tenant dispute, only to find the landlord eating a large chunk of ham.

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Meals in Minutes
programme.desc: Rachael and her sister Maria, joined by friends Leida and Vina, cook up a feast in Rachael's Tuscan kitchen.

programme.title: Zombie House Flipping
programme.desc: Keith talks his partners into going in with him on a zombie house flip located in a prime school district that he not only just purchased but that he already flipped five years ago.

programme.title: Zombie House Flipping
programme.desc: The team's latest project is plagued by plumbing issues, design disputes, budget-busting construction hurdles, and a terrible odor hidden somewhere inside the home.

programme.title: Zombie House Flipping
programme.desc: The team's hospitality is put to the test when unwanted house guests threaten the flip before it even hits the market.

programme.title: Million Dollar Zombie Flips
programme.desc: James Dainard has seen it all, but nothing quite like this. Longtime real estate deal-finders Buck and Will want to partner with James and step into the flipping world, but they're total rookies. Clueless about renovation but full of big ideas, they pitch James on a disaster of a house: a damaged roof, a choppy main floor, and a yard and deck that are more jungle than backyard.

programme.title: Million Dollar Mountain Homes
programme.desc: After establishing a new business in Blue Ridge, Tom and his wife Mary Jane have decided to upgrade their weekender status! But finding a forever home where they can entertain with an art studio for Mary Jane, mountain view, complete seclusion and only minutes from town will be a tall order. Which property will inspire Mary Jane's next masterpiece?

programme.title: Million Dollar Mountain Homes
programme.desc: Chris and Lily are trading in ocean vistas for mountain views and while they agree on the scenery and the need to accommodate extended family, they struggle to see eye to eye on style; after touring everything from traditional to contemporary, whose design eye will prevail?

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Breaking Out
programme.desc: Anthony is trying to move on from his troubled past, but his huge thigh lump is holding him back; Mary has a mysterious 70-year-old bump that amazes Drs. Lee and Tomassian; Sultana has a shocking red rash on her face.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Breaking Out
programme.desc: Denise has a growth on her booty, but scarring from a previous trauma has kept her from getting it removed; Zachary's career is dragged down by his psoriasis; John would love to find a soulmate but will not date because of the huge bump on his cheek.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Breaking Out
programme.desc: Rachael's arm bump interferes with helping her disabled bestie; medical student Gili assists Dr. Lee with Christian's painful back bump; Soniya hates the superstitions and judgments people have about the dark spots covering her face and torso.
